attractions.name: Broadway
attractions.summary: Broadway is a useful Nashville stop for visitors planning around food, neighborhood time, and a more walkable day in the city.
attractions.heroTitle: Broadway guide, things to do, and local tours
attractions.heroSummary: Planning guide for Broadway in Nashville, with visitor basics and helpful local experiences.
thingsToDo: Pair Broadway with a meal, tasting stop, or nearby food-focused block instead of treating it as a standalone stop.
Use Broadway as part of a music-first evening or culture-focused route through the city.
Treat Broadway as an evening block if nightlife is a major part of the trip.
planningTips: Plan Broadway as part of a wider neighborhood or city block instead of making it the only stop in that part of the day.
If Broadway matters most after dark, keep the rest of the day lighter so the evening does not feel rushed.
